bugs.root_cause: Type dedup refactor imported extra shared types into main process that were not referenced.
bugs.fix: Removed unused type imports and cleaned extra newline in renderer types to satisfy lint/prettier.

bugs.error_message: TS2440: Import declaration conflicts with local declaration of 'DEFAULT_UI_SCALE'.
bugs.root_cause: Shared defaults refactor imported DEFAULT_UI_SCALE while old local constant remained.
bugs.fix: Removed local DEFAULT_UI_SCALE constant and kept shared import from src/shared/defaults.ts.

bugs.error_message: TS2322 in useAppStore persisted patch assignment: Type ... is not assignable to type 'undefined'.
bugs.root_cause: Indexed assignment to Partial<PersistedSlice> via union key was too narrow for TypeScript.
bugs.fix: Switched patch assignment to a generic record cast in the diff loop and revalidated build.

bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.root_cause: Had "flex h-full flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-xl b
bugs.fix: Changed to `flex h-full flex-col overflow-hidden bg-app-title

bugs.error_message: Wykres po dodaniu kolejnych leków tylko się sumuje; peak jest zbyt ostry i spadek zbyt krótki.
bugs.root_cause: Generator wykresu sumował surowe krzywe dawek liniowo bez kształtowania odpowiedzi układu, więc kumulacja dawała ostre szczyty i zbyt szybki zjazd.
bugs.fix: Dodano smoothSummedEffect (asymetryczny filtr: szybszy wzrost, wolniejszy spadek) i przełączono slope/band/crash na krzywą wygładzoną.
